defaultDescription: A fan-made Wuthering Waves damage calculator, optimizer, and build planner for resonators, weapons, echoes, rotations, and team setups.

routes.title: Wuthering Waves Damage Calculator
routes.description: Calculate Wuthering Waves resonator damage with live stats, weapons, echoes, enemies, custom buffs, rotations, and team support.

routes.title: Wuthering Waves Build Optimizer
routes.description: Search inventory and theory echo builds, compare ranked results, and tune optimizer constraints around your target skill or rotation.

routes.title: Wuthering Waves Build Benchmark
routes.description: Create Wuthering Waves benchmark reports, compare substat quality, and export showcase cards for resonator builds.

routes.title: Settings
routes.description: Personalize The Wuwa Calculator workspace, themes, typography, background, data sync, and local app preferences.

routes.title: About The Wuwa Calculator
routes.description: Learn what The Wuwa Calculator does, where its Wuthering Waves data and formulas come from, and how the project is maintained.

routes.title: Wuthering Waves Calculator Guides
routes.description: Read operating guides for calculator surfaces, build workflows, optimizer setup, rotations, benchmarks, and app behavior.

routes.title: Wuthering Waves Damage Formula Docs
routes.description: Reference the calculator methods, damage math, benchmark formulas, optimizer search behavior, and scoring details used by the app.

routes.title: Changelog
routes.description: Track Wuthering Waves Calculator updates, live data changes, feature releases, fixes, and patch support.

routes.title: What's New
routes.description: See the detailed update notes for the latest Wuthering Waves Calculator changes and new app features.

routes.title: Privacy Policy
routes.description: Read how The Wuwa Calculator stores local app data, handles optional Google Drive sync, and treats user-provided information.

routes.title: Terms of Service
routes.description: Read the usage terms, warranty disclaimer, and responsibilities for using The Wuwa Calculator.
